cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, may I speak with Mr. Aravind Gopal, sir?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Haan, this is Aravind. Who's calling, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Good morning, Mr. Gopal. My name is Agent Thompson, and I'm calling from Pet Care Veterinary Clinic. We have your pet's annual vaccination due soon.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, okay. Which pet is it for? I have two dogs.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: It's for your dog, Max. Our records show that his vaccinations are due for renewal. We'd like to schedule an appointment for you at your earliest convenience, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Thik hai, that sounds good. What's the best time for the appointment?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We have availability tomorrow at 10 AM or Thursday at 2 PM. Which time works better for you, Mr. Gopal?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Sir, tomorrow at 10 AM is fine, thank you.

slow_thinking_rationale: At 54s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A vet's office calls a pet owner to remind them that their pet's annual vaccinations are due.
